title: selaginella harrisii
intro: Selaginella harrisii is a species of plant in the genus Selaginella, commonly referred to as a type of spikemoss. It is native to tropical regions and has been traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Selaginella harrisii include reducing inflammation, promoting wound healing, and supporting the immune system. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas, infusions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its effectiveness and safety for human consumption.
